_comment: Expected-values reference for the Mounting Plate / Static 1 worker run, derived directly from 'Mounting Plate-Static 1-1.docx' (the SolidWorks Simulation report saved on 2026-04-24). Used by scripts/validate_fea_run.ps1 with -ExpectedReport. Each numeric field has a tolerance applied; tighten them once a real worker run lands so the validator catches regressions but does not flag normal solver float noise.
